states.name: Clare
states.title: Knight of Silver
states.description: Clare was raised in a peaceful village under the loving care of her parents. Though shy by nature, she had a love for adventure. One day, when lost in the forest, she was rescued by Rizette from the neighboring village. From that day on, the two became close friends. Clare admired Rizette for being a highly skilled hunter and viewed her as a dependable big sister.

states.name: Clare
states.title: Knight of Silver
states.description: From then on, Rizette would visit Clare's home, sometimes bringing her younger brother along with her. Clare admired the siblings. One, the brave sister and the other, the clever brother. Gradually, the two became irreplaceable family to her. However, a single misunderstanding tore the relationship to shreds.

states.name: Clare
states.title: Knight of Silver
states.description: Since childhood, Clare has admired Rizette and trained in secret. Because of this, while undergoing the intense training under the Silver Knights, it became clear that she possessed exceptional talent. Now, she has sworn in her heart to use that strength for the sake of her cherished friend and the order.
